title: scutellaria rupestris subsp. geraniana
intro: Scutellaria rupestris subsp. geraniana, also known as alpine skullcap, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria rupestris plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions of Europe, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria rupestris subsp. geraniana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
